name: PLAN0 AI
long_description:
PLAN0 is an AI-powered construction cost intelligence platform serving real estate developers, investors, and general contractors.

PLAN0 analyzes architectural plans using computer vision models to generate detailed cost estimates and analytics in minutes. Through industry partnerships, the platform is also building a database of historical and real-time localized cost data that power its analytics tools. A developer can test whether switching from concrete to steel reduces cost, a lender can stress-test against historical overrun patterns, and a contractor can lock in steel pricing ahead of forecasted hikes.

The vision is to develop the Bloomberg of construction.
one_liner: AI powered construction cost estimation & analytics.
